description_long: This is a commercial-style, horizontal chest refrigerator with a rectangular, boxy form and a flat base. The top features two large, slightly curved sliding glass panels, allowing visibility and access to the interior storage compartment. The body is primarily metallic gray, with a vented grille located on one of the longer sides, likely for air circulation and cooling. The overall design is utilitarian, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements, suitable for urban environments such as convenience stores, garages, or street-side kiosks. The refrigerator appears robust and capable of holding a significant volume of perishable goods. No visible handles or control panels are present, emphasizing a streamlined, functional appearance.
description: A large, metallic gray chest refrigerator with dual curved glass sliding panels on top and a vented grille on one side. Its design is robust and utilitarian, ideal for commercial or urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid metallic panel and the curved profile of the glass top.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the dual glass sliding panels and a vented grille on the lower right side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with a solid metallic panel and curved glass top.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, unadorned metallic surface with no visible features.
attribute_door_handle_style: integrated recessed groove along the edge of the sliding glass panels
attribute_vent_or_grille_pattern: horizontal slats located on the lower right side of the front panel
